---
title: "Methods"
---

# Methods

## Current Workflow

1. Search the literature
2. Import references into DistillerSR
3. Screen studies for relevance
4. Classify evidence
5. Export references as a CSV
6. Upload the CSV to GitHub
7. GitHub Pages automatically publishes the updated website

## Why GitHub?

This prototype evaluates whether GitHub can serve as a centralized repository for evidence surveillance materials while minimizing maintenance requirements.

## Status

This website is a proof of concept and is not intended for production use.
